item.dc:creator: PresidentOfAntifa

item.title: What kindness looks like.
item.description: This guy just got hit by a car while riding his bike, and...he didn't freak out at the driver that hit him. Instead, his first reaction was to go over and console the woman that was visibly shaken by the experience. How would you react?!?
item.dc:creator: LowDownDirtyDeceiver

item.title: My teen daughter said if this chicken cheese curd hits the front page she won’t care and that I’m lame.
item.description: Edit: to those agreeing I’m lame, my daughter is upvoting all of your comments.

item.title: 9 years off heroin
item.description: Seven years ago I was in prison. I started school for social work to help addicts. Today I am a graduate and in a post graduate school. We do recover.
item.dc:creator: deadlysneeze

item.title: Brilliant!
item.description: "I knew it. I'm surrounded by assholes!" - Dark Helmet in Spaceballs the movie.
item.dc:creator: imflukeskywalker

item.title: Depressed, have some memes.
item.description:
I absolutely "love" how I show up on time to my web appointment, only for it to come and go without my counselor even showing up. I waited around and made sure everything was in order ( i.e camera and mic were working. Everything was filled out etc..) And this is all after barely sleeping, and quickly choking down my meds this morning. Awesome feeling, just freaking great. Good morning to me.
I need an unhealthy amount of coffee right now.
item.dc:creator: sleepyvoidboi

item.title: A new sculpture in central Kyiv on the site of the demolished Lenin statue
item.description: Temporary sculptural installation: "Shoot Yourself" 2022 by Dmytro Iv. History knows two outcomes for the war criminals: a trial or... "PUTLER, TAKE THE HINT"
item.dc:creator: 7oidberg
